raw_result.description: CRM platform for managing sales pipelines, contacts, deals, and related business workflows.
raw_result.auth_notes: Official docs describe OAuth 2.0 for marketplace/public apps and API token auth via the x-api-token header for direct API access.
raw_result.gating_reason: Pipedrive Developer Hub offers self-serve app registration and a sandbox account from the public developers site; no partner approval was verified as required for initial API access.

api_surface.breadth: Public API documentation covers Core API concepts and versioned REST endpoints (v1 and v2) for CRM objects and related operations; no official GraphQL surface was found in the reviewed first-party docs.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Pipedrive MCP server page or repository was found in the reviewed first-party sources; absence is not definitive for community MCPs.

raw_result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limit docs describe a token-based daily budget: 30,000 base tokens multiplied by plan multiplier and seat count, with rollout starting for new customers in Dec 2024 and for existing customers during 2025.
raw_result.notable_signals: Public developer portal, sandbox availability, versioned API docs, and documented OAuth plus API-token auth indicate strong near-term toolkit buildability. Rate limiting is clearly documented and tied to account plan/seats.
raw_result.human_review_reason: MCP availability could not be definitively ruled out beyond reviewed first-party sources, and self-serve access details were inferred from the public developer/sandbox pages rather than a dedicated pricing or access-policy page.

result.description: CRM platform for managing sales pipelines, contacts, deals, and related business workflows.
result.auth_notes: Official docs describe OAuth 2.0 for marketplace/public apps and API token auth via the x-api-token header for direct API access.
result.gating_reason: Pipedrive Developer Hub offers self-serve app registration and a sandbox account from the public developers site; no partner approval was verified as required for initial API access.

api_surface.breadth: Public API documentation covers Core API concepts and versioned REST endpoints (v1 and v2) for CRM objects and related operations; no official GraphQL surface was found in the reviewed first-party docs.
api_surface.mcp_notes: No official Pipedrive MCP server page or repository was found in the reviewed first-party sources; absence is not definitive for community MCPs.

result.rate_limit_notes: Official rate-limit docs describe a token-based daily budget: 30,000 base tokens multiplied by plan multiplier and seat count, with rollout starting for new customers in Dec 2024 and for existing customers during 2025.
result.notable_signals: Public developer portal, sandbox availability, versioned API docs, and documented OAuth plus API-token auth indicate strong near-term toolkit buildability. Rate limiting is clearly documented and tied to account plan/seats.
result.human_review_reason: MCP availability could not be definitively ruled out beyond reviewed first-party sources, and self-serve access details were inferred from the public developer/sandbox pages rather than a dedicated pricing or access-policy page.
